tools.name: check_cabal_risk
tools.description:
Pre-trade safety check for any Solana token mint: is a buyer about to be
someone's exit liquidity? Every flag links to its on-chain evidence tx.

Layers, ordered by STRENGTH OF EVIDENCE (not marketing):

1. HOLDER CONCENTRATION — what share one wallet actually controls
   (`top_holder_pct`). A singl

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "check_cabal_risk" stacks urgency/override words (important, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Pre-trade safety check for any Solana token mint: is a buyer about to be someone's exit liquidity? Every flag links to its on-chain evidence tx. Layers, ordered…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_cabal_risk · Private data: check_cabal_risk · Public sink: check_cabal_risk.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_cabal_risk · Private data: check_cabal_risk · Public sink: check_cabal_risk

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
